text: Oh my god. Oh no, put it in her eyes if you did with Caleb and Caleb has to do. We had to take a bath. Exactly. I'm glad we'll do that because she learned the hard way. He learned those eyes. Look at that. You don't get it, but in your face. No, she's very particular. Just hear me. She's fussing. What? You want to get Caleb? Okay, alright.
